career.name: AgencyAnalytics
career.title: Frontend Developer
description: Collaborated within a cross-functional frontend team to maintain and evolve an internal React component library, working closely with product designers and backend engineers to deliver reusable, accessible UI components and scalable frontend features using React, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, and Tailwind CSS.

Led the development of a session management interface that enabled users to view and revoke active login sessions, improving account security and providing a self-service experience for account access management.

Contributed to a React 18 migration effort that delivered 90+ upgrade and regression-fix tasks in under two weeks, resolving race conditions, updating dependencies, and ensuring compatibility across the internal component library and application surfaces.

career.name: Mortle
career.title: Software Developer
description: Designed and developed an app for a Death startup using Next.js, Supabase, TypeScript, SQL, Mixpanel and Figma.
Implemented an iterative design approach to efficiently design features using Figma, and developed and refined them based on user feedback and analytics to deliver a user-centered experience.

Resolved a caching issue between Next.js and Supabase by implementing a custom solution, ensuring faster page loads and reducing database queries. Since Next.js relies on an SDK with method calls instead of fetch, I optimized data retrieval to improve performance.

career.name: Chance Voight
career.title: Full Stack Software Developer
description: Designed and Built software for a fintech company using Typescript, Next.js, Tailwind, Supabase and Figma.

Worked closely with the marketing team, general manager, and CEO, utilizing Agile methodologies to drive the design, development and maintenance of web applications, ensuring alignment, consistency and efficient project delivery.
Implemented lazy loading on videos, reducing page load time and improving the Lighthouse performance score by 10%.
Redesigned the “Contact Us” page, boosting the Lighthouse accessibility score by 5%, improving user experience and search engine rankings.
